scripts.build:mobile:prod: node scripts/validate-mobile-env.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production NUXT_MOBILE_PRODUCTION=true NUXT_CAPACITOR=true nuxt generate && node scripts/verify-mobile-dist.mjs
scripts.build:mobile:dev: node scripts/validate-mobile-env.mjs --dev && cross-env CAPACITOR_DEV=true NUXT_CAPACITOR=true nuxt generate && node scripts/verify-mobile-dist.mjs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile:prod && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:dev: npm run build:mobile:dev && cross-env CAPACITOR_DEV=true npx cap sync
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync:dev && cross-env CAPACITOR_DEV=true npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:android:live: node scripts/warn-skip-sync.mjs && cross-env CAPACITOR_DEV=true npx cap run android --no-sync
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync:dev && cross-env CAPACITOR_DEV=true npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:assets: npm run assets:generate && npx @capacitor/assets generate --assetPath resources --iconBackgroundColor '#1e3a8a' --splashBackgroundColor '#1e3a8a'
